# barracudawaf_csp_policy (Resource)

`barracudawaf_csp_policy` manages `CSP Policy` on the Barracuda Web Application Firewall.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "barracudawaf_csp_policy" "test_csp" {
    csp_policy_name = "test_terraform_csp"
    parent = [ "DemoApp1", "default" ]
    status = "On"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- **csp_policy_name** (String) CSP Policy Name
- **parent** (List of String) Parent format: [service_name, rule_name]

### Optional

- **base_uri** (List of String) Base URI
- **block_all_mixed_content** (String) Block All Mixed Content
- **child_src** (List of String) Child Source
- **connect_src** (List of String) Connect Source
- **csp_mode** (String) Mode
- **default_src** (List of String) Default Source
- **font_src** (List of String) Font Source
- **form_action** (List of String) Forms Action
- **frame_src** (List of String) Frame Source
- **frames_ancestors** (List of String) Frames Ancestors
- **img_src** (List of String) Image Source
- **media_src** (List of String) Media Source
- **object_src** (List of String) Object Source
- **report_uri** (String) Report URI
- **script_src** (List of String) Script Source
- **status** (String) Status
- **style_src** (List of String) Style Source
- **upgrade_unsecure_req** (String) Upgrade Insecure Requests
